source: DUKES 2025, Table 6.2 'Plant capacity: United Kingdom (renewable sources)', 'Installed Capacity (MW) [note 1]' block, UK-wide, end-of-year. Offshore = 'Offshore Wind' + 'Floating offshore wind' to match the nameplate anchor basis.
basis_note: Each value is the published end-of-year installed capacity, held constant across the following year (annual-step). Because capacity is rising, holding a year-end figure across the whole year imparts a small, known, monotonic timing bias (capacity-factor denominators run slightly low late in each year); this is disclosed, not modelled away. Linear interpolation is deliberately not used — its in-between values appear in no DUKES table and would breach the v1 'no modelled figures' rule. The 2024 row is identical to data/nameplate.json (the live anchor). 2009 solar = 26.5 MW rounds to 0.026 GW.
